news.title: Trump renews Greenland threats at NATO summit, says U.S. could remove troops from Europe
news.summary: NATO fell into a crisis earlier this year as Trump demanded that the U.S. must take control of Greenland on national security grounds.

news.title: Chinese lidar maker with Nvidia ties accused of being cyber risk for U.S.
news.summary: Hesai Technology was blacklisted as a national security threat in 2024. The U.S. Department of Defense designated Hesai as a Chinese military entity.

news.title: Stellantis to sell small Fiat Topolino EV for $13,995 in U.S.
news.summary: The Topolino is a quadricycle that functions more like a golf cart. The EV is actually a small car such as the Fiat 500.

news.title: Rivian stock falls more than 10% as company sells 75 million shares to raise capital
news.summary: The capital raise occurred during extended hours trading following Rivian shares increasing 8.1% on Monday after increasing 19.2% last week.

news.title: Trump ally Nigel Farage quits UK parliament amid finance scandal to fight special election
news.summary: Reform U.K. leader Nigel Farage has quit as MP for Clacton. He has said he will fight the by-election.

news.title: NATO announces billions in defense deals. What investors should watch for now.
news.summary: A number of major defense companies, including Rheinmetall and Lockheed Martin have announced billions of dollars worth of backlogs. The backlogs are expected to last for years.

news.title: ‘Our family is broken beyond repair’: My brother took over my parents’ finances. What can I do?
news.summary: “Without telling me, my brother petitioned for sole guardianship of our mother’s,” she said. “Without knowing what was going on, he petitioned to be sole guardian.”

news.title: I found a simple way to save money on frozen pizza. What’s your best money-saving trick?
news.summary: “I changed my approach to cooking,” she says. “I’m not a chef. I’ve never been a chef’s chef.”

news.title: Micron’s stock falls as investors wonder if the memory market is near the top
news.summary: “Most investor feedback continues to point to a skittish AI tape,” one analyst said. “Most of the time, it’s not very good,’ he said.

news.title: How parents can take advantage of the ‘best summer-camp tax break in years’
news.summary: For many kids, summer means camp. For many parents, that means financial juggling to pay for those camp experiences. For some parents, it means paying more than $1,000 a year.
